query: fluorescent green tinted hospital corridor cold light photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — fluorescent cold/green clinical tints, institutional cast

response.objective_caption: Four elongated bronze humanoid sculptures in active poses stand on a snow-covered mound at night. Behind them rise two large cylindrical buildings with facades illuminated by gradients of green, red, and cyan light. Upward-facing spotlights embedded in the snow highlight the rough, textured metal surfaces of the figures. The sky is completely dark, and the image is enclosed by a thin black border.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Four elongated bronze humanoid sculptures in active poses stand on a snow-covered mound at night, their surreal stretched proportions and the dreamlike placement of rough metal figures against massive, smoothly glowing cylindrical structures creating an irrational, otherworldly tableau. Behind them, two large cylindrical buildings display facades illuminated by shifting gradients of green, red, and cyan light. Upward-facing spotlights embedded in the snow highlight the textured metal surfaces of the sculptures, while the pitch-black sky and thin border enhance the uncanny, fantastical atmosphere of the scene.
